text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. proposed during negotiations: We leave here a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President Vance’s remarks are over, they lasted less than 4 minutes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯谈及美国在谈判中提出的建议：我们在此留下一个非常简单的提议。一种理解方式，这是我们最终且最好的方案。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯的讲话结束了，持续时间不到4分钟。@wfwitness

text: Until you accept our terms and concede
text_zh: 直到你们接受我们的条款并让步

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance om what the U.S. needs to see to from Iran on the nuclear program: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. proposed during negotiations: We leave here a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯谈及美国需要伊朗在核计划方面表现出的态度：我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求使他们能够迅速实现这一目标的工具……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯谈及美国在谈判中提出的建议：我们在此留下一个非常简单的提议。一种理解方式，这是我们最终且最好的方案。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。@wfwitness

text: Nothing can or should deter us from fulfilling our great historic mission toward our beloved homeland and the noble Iranian civilization. The Islamic Republic of Iran is determined to use all tools, including diplomacy, to secure national interests and protect the country’s welfare. Over the past 24 hours, discussions have covered various dimensions of the core issues under negotiation, including the Strait of Hormuz, the nuclear file, war reparations, sanctions relief, and a complete end to the war against Iran and in the region. The success of this diplomatic process depends on the seriousness and good faith of the other side, refraining from excessive demands and unlawful conditions, and recognizing Iran’s legitimate rights and interests. We express our appreciation to the government and the warm and honorable people of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan for hosting the talks and for their good offices in advancing this process.
text_zh: 没有什么能够或应该阻止我们履行对我们挚爱的祖国和高贵的伊朗文明的伟大历史使命。伊朗伊斯兰共和国决心利用一切手段，包括外交手段，来维护国家利益并保护国家的福祉。在过去24小时内，讨论涵盖了谈判核心问题的各个方面，包括霍尔木兹海峡、核档案、战争赔偿、制裁解除，以及彻底结束针对伊朗和该地区的战争。这一外交进程的成功取决于对方的严肃态度和诚意，不提出过分要求和非法条件，并承认伊朗的合法权利和利益。我们对巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国政府及其热情、尊贵的人民为举办此次会谈所做的努力以及在推动这一进程中发挥的斡旋作用表示感谢。

text: Iran Foreign ministry spokesperson @IRIMFA_SPOX issued the following : Diplomacy, for us, is a continuation of the sacred struggle of those who defend the land of Iran. We have not forgotten—and will not forget—the experience of U.S. breaches of trust and ill intent. Just as we will not forgive the heinous crimes committed by them and the Zionist regime during the second and third imposed wars. Today was a long and demanding day for the delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran in Islamabad. Intensive negotiations, which began on Saturday morning with Pakistan’s good offices and mediation, have continued uninterrupted until now, with numerous messages and draft texts exchanged between the two sides. Iranian negotiators are employing all their capabilities, experience, and knowledge to safeguard Iran’s rights and interests. The heavy loss of our leaders, loved ones, and compatriots has only strengthened our resolve to pursue the interests and rights of the Iranian people.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人 @IRIMFA_SPOX 发表了以下声明：对我们而言，外交是那些保卫伊朗土地的人们神圣斗争的延续。我们没有忘记，也不会忘记美国背信弃义和恶意企图的经历。正如我们不会原谅他们和犹太复国主义政权在第二次和第三次强加的战争中所犯下的滔天罪行。对于伊朗伊斯兰共和国代表团来说，今天在伊斯兰堡是漫长而艰巨的一天。从周六早上开始，在巴基斯坦的斡旋和调解下，密集的谈判一直不间断地持续到现在，双方交换了大量的消息和文本草案。伊朗谈判代表正在运用他们所有的能力、经验和知识来维护伊朗的权利和利益。我们领导人、亲人和同胞的沉重损失只会加强我们追求伊朗人民利益和权利的决心。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰U.S. Vice President said that a deal still could not be reached after 21 hours of talks with Iran, which claims is bad news for Iran. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance om what the U.S. needs to see to from Iran on the nuclear program: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon. We haven't seen that yet. We hope that we will. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 美国副总统表示，在与伊朗进行了21小时的会谈后仍未能达成协议，并称这对伊朗来说是坏消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更糟糕的消息。” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯谈及美国需要伊朗在核计划方面表现出的态度：我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求使他们能够迅速实现核武器的工具。我们还没有看到这一点。我们希望我们会看到。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ U.S. Vice President JD Vance has said that no deal was made during the 21+ hours of negotiations... ...saying “we could just not get to a situation where the Iranians were willing to accept our terms.” He restated that the Iranians were unwilling to shift left or right on key U.S. demands, including their nuclear program.
text_zh: ❗️ 美国副总统万斯表示，在21个多小时的谈判中没有达成任何协议……并称“我们无法达成伊朗愿意接受我们条款的局面”。他重申，伊朗人不愿在包括核计划在内的美国关键要求上做出任何让步。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CBS: J.D. Vance is expected to speak at a press conference in Islamabad shortly. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President said that a deal still could not be reached after 21 hours of talks with Iran, which claims is bad news for Iran. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the US. So, we go back to the US having not come to an agreement ... they have chosen not to accept our terms. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CBS：万斯预计很快将在伊斯兰堡举行新闻发布会。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美国副总统表示，在与伊朗进行了21小时的会谈后仍未能达成协议，并称这对伊朗来说是坏消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更糟糕的消息。所以，我们回到美国，因为没有达成协议……他们选择不接受我们的条款。@wfwitness

text: 🇶🇦 The Malice of Al Jazeera Yesterday, Al Jazeera released a video of deceptive editing to portray Iran as deliberately targeting civilians in Qatar. In the first minute the network combined two different clips — a distant impact and a closer view — to suggest a direct missile strike on residential areas, creating a misleading impression of intentional civilian targeting . The footage actually shows missile booster, not a precision attack.
text_zh: 🇶🇦 半岛电视台的恶意 昨天，半岛电视台发布了一段经过欺骗性剪辑的视频，旨在将伊朗描绘成蓄意针对卡塔尔平民。在第一分钟，该网络将两个不同的片段——一次远距离撞击和一次近距离观察——结合在一起，暗示对居民区进行了直接导弹袭击，造成了蓄意针对平民的误导性印象。录像实际上显示的是导弹助推器，而不是精确打击。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump is currently attending UFC 327 in Miami, Florida and walked out with Dana White. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver air defense systems, including MANPADS, to Iran in the coming weeks. The shipments are reportedly being routed through third countries to obscure their origin, and could help Iran replenish…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 CNN: The Chinese Embassy in the U.S. denied that China is preparing to send weapons to Iran. “China has never provided weapons to any party to the conflict; the information in question is untrue. As a responsible major country, China consistently fulfills its international obligations. We urge the U.S. side to refrain from making baseless allegations, maliciously drawing connections, and engaging in sensationalism; we hope that relevant parties will do more to help de-escalate tensions.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 CNN：美国情报显示，中国准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付包括便携式防空导弹（MANPADS）在内的防空系统。据报道，这些货物正通过第三国转运以掩盖其来源，并可能帮助伊朗补充……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 CNN：中国驻美大使馆否认中国准备向伊朗运送武器。“中国从未向冲突的任何一方提供武器；有关信息是不真实的。作为一个负责任的大国，中国一贯履行其国际义务。我们敦促美方停止发表毫无根据的指责、恶意关联和煽动性言论；我们希望有关各方多做有助于缓解紧张局势的事情。” @wfwitness

Vice President Vance has been in negotiations for the past 16 hours, as a part of in person trilateral talks between the U.S., Pakistan, and Iran over this past month’s conflict in the Middle East. tweet

text: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ UK Police arrest more than 500 people during a demonstration against the ban on Palestine Action in central London. The age of those arrested ranged from 18 to 87.
text_zh: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 英国警方在伦敦市中心举行的反对禁止“巴勒斯坦行动”（Palestine Action）的示威活动中逮捕了500多人。被捕者的年龄从18岁到87岁不等。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷Tasnim: Negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in Islamabad have been extended by one day. Negotiations will resume later in the morning after both sides accepted a Pakistani proposal. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baqaei said negotiations between Iran and the U.S. in Islamabad have been intense and ongoing, with indirect exchanges continuing throughout the day via Pakistani mediation. He stated that discussions over the past 24 hours have covered key issues including the Strait of Hormuz, Iran’s nuclear programme, war reparations, sanctions relief, and a complete end to the conflict. Baqaei stressed that Iran remains committed to defending its national interests, while warning that the success of the diplomatic process depends on the seriousness and good faith of the U.S., as well as respect for Iran’s rights. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：美国和伊朗在伊斯兰堡的谈判延长了一天。在双方接受巴基斯坦的提议后，谈判将于上午晚些时候恢复。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人巴盖里表示，伊朗和美国在伊斯兰堡的谈判一直很激烈且在进行中，通过巴基斯坦的调解，间接交流全天都在持续。他表示，过去24小时的讨论涵盖了关键问题，包括霍尔木兹海峡、伊朗核计划、战争赔偿、制裁解除以及彻底结束冲突。巴盖里强调，伊朗仍然致力于捍卫其国家利益，同时警告说，外交进程的成功取决于美国的严肃态度和诚意，以及对伊朗权利的尊重。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor RT @Acyn : Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about opening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Are they reopening it? Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043073005472063515/video/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : Good article but this bit isn’t exactly true. “Turkey has historically been very wary of its large neighbor and is an important arms seller to Ukraine. However, while it sells weapons, it gives almost no military and humanitarian aid to Kyiv.” Much of what Turkey has given Ukraine it has done so quietly or covertly. Ankara was to provide Kyiv with cluster bombs. It also gave MLRS in 2022, and TRLG-230 laser-guided surface-to-surface missiles. Also, I seem to recall a famous Ukrainian ditty about a certain drone system which played a crucial role in the Battle of Kyiv… https://www.politico.eu/article/ukraine-volodymyr-zelenskyy-warms-up-with-black-sea-strongman-turkiye/ tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @michaeldweiss：文章写得不错，但这一部分并不完全属实。“土耳其历史上一直对其庞大的邻国非常警惕，是乌克兰重要的武器销售国。然而，虽然它出售武器，但几乎没有向基辅提供任何军事和人道主义援助。” 土耳其给乌克兰的大部分东西都是悄悄或秘密进行的。安卡拉曾向基辅提供集束炸弹。它还在2022年提供了多管火箭炮（MLRS）和TRLG-230激光制导地对地导弹。此外，我似乎记得一首著名的乌克兰小调，关于某种无人机系统，它在基辅战役中发挥了关键作用…… https://www.politico.eu/article/ukraine-volodymyr-zelenskyy-warms-up-with-black-sea-strongman-turkiye/ 推文

text: Nuno Felix You fuckers killed hundreds of Dutch citizens. You are the enemy of us all "We are not enemies of the Dutch people and of the Netherlands" - watch honest podcast with the Russian Ambassador H.E. Vladimir Tarabrin. Full video here: https://youtu.be/3hjeUeYVEME?is=OB9Y3QKHdxIVED1G https://twitter.com/rusembassynl/status/2042518318586753162/video/1 - Russian Embassy in NL 🇷🇺 🇳🇱 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 你们这些混蛋杀害了数百名荷兰公民。你们是我们所有人的敌人。“我们不是荷兰人民和荷兰国家的敌人” - 观看与俄罗斯大使弗拉基米尔·塔拉布林阁下的坦诚播客。完整视频在这里：https://youtu.be/3hjeUeYVEME?is=OB9Y3QKHdxIVED1G https://twitter.com/rusembassynl/status/2042518318586753162/video/1 - 俄罗斯驻荷兰大使馆 🇷🇺 🇳🇱 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Intensive Israeli jets presence over the majority of southern Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 以色列喷气式飞机在叙利亚南部大部分地区上空密集出现。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israel launched airstrikes against the town of Qana, southern Lebanon, early this Sunday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列于本周日清晨对黎巴嫩南部的卡纳镇发动了空袭。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 Fars correspondent dispatched to Islamabad: Negotiations will continue from Sunday morning." 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 About 15 hours have passed since the start of joint negotiations, expert discussions are still ongoing at Serena Hotel — Fars News Agency
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社驻伊斯兰堡记者：谈判将从周日上午继续。” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 联合谈判开始至今已过去约15小时，专家讨论仍在塞雷纳酒店进行 — 法尔斯通讯社

text: ❗️ Airstrikes in the town of Qana near the municipality formed a fire belt that destroyed a number of homes Massive other airstrikes all around
text_zh: ❗️ 卡纳镇市政厅附近的空袭形成了一条火带，摧毁了许多房屋，周围还有大规模的其他空袭

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Al-Jazeera: Negotiations between the United States and Iran were conducted directly, with participation from Pakistan, with the Pakistani delegation put forward a proposal aimed at regulating navigation in the Strait of Hormuz. A Pakistani source reports the proposal includes the implementation of joint patrols in the strategic waterway as part of efforts to ensure safe passage and stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 半岛电视台：美国和伊朗之间的谈判是直接进行的，巴基斯坦参与其中，巴基斯坦代表团提出了旨在规范霍尔木兹海峡航行的建议。巴基斯坦消息人士称，该提议包括在这一战略水道实施联合巡逻，作为确保安全通行和稳定努力的一部分。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CNN: The status of the Strait of Hormuz will remain unchanged until Iran and the United States agree on a 'common framework' for negotiations. An Iranian security source claims that, what he called excessive deamnds, from the U.S. over the critical shipping route have blocked progress toward a shared basis for talks, warning that the Strait will remain closed until the U.S. adopts a more realistic approach. They report that Tehran has made clear that without an agreed framework, even previously discussed arrangements on limited ship passage will not be implemented. They added that Iran shown their ability to reinforce restrictions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CNN：在伊朗和美国就谈判的“共同框架”达成一致之前，霍尔木兹海峡的现状将保持不变。一位伊朗安全消息人士声称，美国对这一关键航运路线提出的所谓过分要求阻碍了达成共同谈判基础的进展，并警告说，除非美国采取更现实的态度，否则海峡将保持关闭。他们报告说，德黑兰已经明确表示，如果没有商定的框架，即使是之前讨论的关于有限船只通行的安排也不会实施。他们补充说，伊朗已经展示了其加强限制的能力。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Fars correspondent dispatched to Islamabad: Negotiations will continue from Sunday morning.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社驻伊斯兰堡记者：谈判将从周日上午继续。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷IRIB: Another round of in-person direct negotitations has ended between U.S. and Iranian negotiators and resumed after a break to exchange texts with experts. Negotiations have been ongoing for 14 hours so far. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Tasnim: Negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in Islamabad have been extended by one day. Negotiations will resume later in the morning after both sides accepted a Pakistani proposal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 IRIB：美伊谈判代表之间的另一轮面对面直接谈判已经结束，在与专家交换文本的休息后恢复。谈判至今已持续14小时。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：美国和伊朗在伊斯兰堡的谈判延长了一天。在双方接受巴基斯坦的提议后，谈判将于上午晚些时候恢复。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 🖌 Christ is Risen! Happy Holy Pascha! Pascha is our main symbol of hope. Light is stronger than darkness. Life is stronger than death. We believe in this — and it is precisely this that gives us strength. Today this meaning is felt with particular acuteness, especially by those who stand shoulder to shoulder with death. Somewhere on the front lines our comrades are celebrating the Paschal night far from home — and it is precisely there, in this proximity to the very edge, that prayer gains true power, hope becomes not consolation, but support, and thoughts of loved ones warm in a way no fire ever could. High-resolution artwork: 🔸 The Savior 🔸 Prayer 🔸 Light in Darkness 🔸 Of Home 🔸 Paschal Greetings 🔸 Pascha on the Front #art #holiday #Russia ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版：🖌 基督复活了！复活节快乐！复活节是我们希望的主要象征。光明比黑暗更强大。生命比死亡更强大。我们相信这一点——正是这一点给了我们力量。今天，这种意义被特别敏锐地感受到，尤其是那些与死亡并肩作战的人。在战线上的某个地方，我们的同志们远离家乡庆祝复活节之夜——正是那里，在离边缘如此近的地方，祈祷获得了真正的力量，希望不再是安慰，而是支持，对亲人的思念带来的温暖是任何火焰都无法比拟的。高分辨率艺术作品：🔸 救世主 🔸 祈祷 🔸 黑暗中的光明 🔸 家乡 🔸 复活节问候 🔸 前线的复活节 #艺术 #节日 #俄罗斯 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 支持我们 原始消息

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷IRIB: Another round of in-person direct negotitations has ended between U.S. and Iranian negotiators and resumed after a break to exchange texts with experts. Negotiations have been ongoing for 14 hours so far. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Mehr: Negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in Islamabad have ended after 14 hours. False, apologies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 IRIB：美伊谈判代表之间的另一轮面对面直接谈判已经结束，在与专家交换文本的休息后恢复。谈判至今已持续14小时。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Mehr：美伊在伊斯兰堡的谈判在14小时后结束。错误，抱歉。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Fars News Agency: Trilateral talks between Iran and the United States in Islamabad continue intensively, with approximately nine hours having passed since they began. Local time is now 2:21am. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 IRIB: Another round of in-person direct negotitations has ended between U.S. and Iranian negotiators and resumed after a break to exchange texts with experts. Negotiations have been ongoing for 14 hours so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 法尔斯通讯社：伊朗和美国在伊斯兰堡的三方会谈正在紧张进行，距离开始已经过去了大约九个小时。当地时间现在是凌晨2:21。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 IRIB：美伊谈判代表之间的另一轮面对面直接谈判已经结束，在与专家交换文本的休息后恢复。谈判至今已持续14小时。@wfwitness

text: Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. Who are you with? Reporter: NBC News. Trump: NBC? That’s fake news.
text_zh: 记者：伊朗没有听从你们关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。你是哪家媒体的？记者：NBC新闻。特朗普：NBC？那是假新闻。

text: Trump on China sending weapons to Iran: If China does that, China is going to have big problems.
text_zh: 特朗普谈中国向伊朗运送武器：如果中国这样做，中国将会有大麻烦。

text: Trump: We are in very deep negotiations with Iran. We win regardless.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们正在与伊朗进行非常深入的谈判。无论如何我们都赢了。

text: Trump: We win, regardless what happens, we win. Let’s see what happens. Maybe they will make a deal, maybe they won’t. It doesn’t matter. From the standpoint of America, we win.
text_zh: 特朗普：无论发生什么，我们都赢了，我们赢了。让我们看看会发生什么。也许他们会达成协议，也许不会。这没关系。从美国的角度来看，我们赢了。

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 The Kuwaiti police announced they foiled a plot involving the financing of terrorist organisations and threats to national security, leading to the arrest of 24 people. They accuse them of using commercial and professional fronts to launder funds, and relied on coordinated methods by air and land, distributing funds among multiple individuals to avoid detection. One of those detained had already had their citizenship revoked, while eight additional fugitives abroad were identified, including one stripped of citizenship. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 科威特警方宣布挫败了一起涉及资助恐怖组织和威胁国家安全的阴谋，导致24人被捕。他们指控这些人利用商业和专业幌子洗钱，并依靠空中和陆地的协调方法，将资金分配给多名个人以逃避侦查。其中一名被拘留者此前已被剥夺公民身份，另有八名在逃人员在国外被确认，其中包括一名被剥夺公民身份的人。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Some serious disagreements between the Iranian and American delegations in the negotiations still remain. The ball is in the American court to replace ambition with a realistic approach by overcoming the usual excesses. — Tasnim
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗和美国代表团在谈判中仍存在一些严重分歧。球在美国一边，需要通过克服通常的过分要求，用现实的态度取代野心。 — 塔斯尼姆通讯社
